text:
I feel as though I am wandering through spaces where inquiry is both encouraged and essential. In the first scene, gazing through glass at a group collaborating in a room filled with technology, I feel both separated and connected—the sense of potential in human cooperation and thoughtful design is palpable.

The second scene envelops me in the language of research and development; the vibrant colors and philosophical words on the wall awaken curiosity. I am an observer and a participant, caught between reflection and anticipation. I am inspired, quietly delighted to be in places where questions matter as much as answers.
